description: Style Notejealous 21 stays in-vogue with this stylish piece that is sure to become a love-forever favourite in your casual wardrobe. Wear it with form fitting denims and a blazer, style with understated accessories and peep-toe shoes.Product DetailsWhite v-neck top that has short raglan sleeves, graphic print on the front with a stud detail and a bow above the left hemMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash delicate in cold water with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleach, scrub, wring, tumble dry or dry cleanDry flat in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height:5'8" and chest:33") is wearing a size M
